log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13
REASONING: Round 1: Too far for melee. Spiritual Weapon + ranged.
MOVEMENT: Moves toward Orc — Armored Escapist.
ACTION: Cast Spiritual Weapon (Level 2 slot). melee_spell attack vs Orc — Armored Escapist.
→ melee_spell attack: [d20:14+3=17 vs AC 20] MISS.
ACTION: Cast Sacred Flame (Level 0). DC 11 DEX save on Orc — Armored Escapist.
→ Orc — Armored Escapist: DEX save [d20:13+6=19 vs DC 11] SUCCESS. No effect.
REASONING: Fireball on 1 targets!
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 14 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Orc — Armored Escapist: SUCCESS. 16 damage (half).
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
